_comment: GAME-THREAD QUEUE demo: same as unit_getmode.spec.json but onGameThread=true, so the oracle marshals BOTH the original and reimpl calls onto the GAME THREAD (via D2Gt_Call -> the capture-hook pump) instead of running them on the HTTP thread. Validates the thread-marshalling mechanism -- the correct execution context for functions that touch live game state / race the game thread. UNIT_GetMode is a read-only getter here (safe either way); the point is the marshalling. Requires being in-world (the pump only runs when the capture hook fires).
name: UNIT_GetMode
